memory_policy.organizational: memorize; revise on org change events
memory_policy.policy_current: memorize the current version; retain history as temporal
memory_policy.temporal: retain with validity window; never surface as current

facts.statement: StashSage for Path of Exile 2 (POE2) is a hvac company. StashSage for Path of Exile 2 (POE2) is the synthetic company at the center of a one-year operating story, framed by a market of Path of Exile 2 players and traders and by item price prediction and trade-tool services. In the fictional HVAC arc, founders Nadia Carr and Anthony Ellis turn a two-person start into a disciplined field-service company built around urgent repair, scheduled install work, and recurring maintenance_plan relationships. Nadia protects field quality and technical credibility while Anthony makes dispatch, process, and commercial work repeatable; together they convert early delivery pressure into a durable operating rhythm.
install (svc_01) is one of the company's service lines.
repair (svc_02) is one of the company's service lines.
maintenance_plan (svc_03) is one of the company's service lines.
